texto: The present presses automatically on you. The future does not. To attend to the future requires bandwidth, which scarcity taxes. When scarcity taxes our bandwidth, we become even more focused on the here and now. We need cognitive resources to gauge future needs, and we need executive control to resist present temptations. As it taxes our bandwidth, scarcity focuses on the present, and leads us to borrow.
explicacao: Citação de Sendhil Mullainathan sobre temas ligados a negocios. “The present presses automatically on you. The future does not. To attend to the future requires b…” articula negocios, borrowing, money-management em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como termino e money-management.

texto: Some struggle with medical issues - like insomnia - that make sleep hard. But for many of us, the quantity and quality of sleep come down to a matter of choice. Still, only a few enterprising economists have looked closely at this, and generally, those have assumed that we choose our hours of sleep optimally.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sendhil Mullainathan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Some struggle with medical issues - like insomnia - that make sleep hard. But for many of us, the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, struggle, sleep pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sleep e quality.

Still, only a few enterprising economists have looked closely at this, and generally, those have assumed that we choose our hours of sleep optimally.

texto: Economists specialize in pointing out unpleasant trade-offs - a skill that is on full display in the health care debate. We want patients to receive the best care available. We also want consumers to pay less. And we don't want to bankrupt the government or private insurers. Something must give.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sendhil Mullainathan sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Economists specialize in pointing out unpleasant trade-offs - a skill that is on full display in …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, government, útil em momentos de inspiracao e government.
